Business Pillars is a specialized Saudi brand headquartered in Riyadh, dedicated

combine elegance with high performance, along with related building facades.

reached the pinnacle of excellence in the manufacture of external cladding doors.
Our products are known for their durability and resistance to the extreme weather

title: For those who desire expansive spaces and a sense of luxury, our
sample: For those who desire expansive spaces and a sense of luxury, our
modern pivot doors are the ideal solutions. Made entirely of
aluminum, these doors offer a grand and contemporary look.
Pivot doors are unique in that their hinges are placed at the top and
bottom, allowing the door to rotate around a central vertical axis.
These doors can reach heights of up to eight meters with widths of
up to 1.8 meters, offering a truly impressive entrance.
